title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXL. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Brave news is come to town,
            Brave news is carried;
        Brave news is come to town,
            Jemmy Dawson's married.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXL. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
